description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag with its lovely texture is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 32 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 5 cm Textured leatherette upper for durability and style One main compartment with a zip fastening and organiser pouchs and a zippered pocket inside One long removeable strap One zipped and one flapped pocket on the front Metal brand badge and embossed branding on the front Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
